name: Select
description: A customizable select dropdown component with search functionality, editable items, and custom styling options.

items.description: Array of items to display in the select dropdown. Each item must have 'label' and 'code' properties

selectedItem.description: The code of the currently selected item

onChange.description: Callback function called when an item is selected. Receives the full item object

onUpdate.description: Callback function called when the edit icon is clicked (only when editable is true)

onDelete.description: Callback function called when the delete icon is clicked (only when editable is true)

searchable.description: If true, displays a search input to filter items

placeholder.description: Placeholder text for the search input (defaults to 'Filtrar opciones')

emptyItemsMessage.description: Message to display when no items match the search filter

selectedColor.description: Text color for the selected item

selectedBackground.description: Background color for the selected item (supports gradients)

editable.description: If true, shows edit and delete icons for each item

advanced.title: Searchable select with custom styling
advanced.description: Select with search functionality and gradient styling

advanced.title: Editable select with actions
advanced.description: Select with edit and delete actions for each item

advanced.title: Select with custom item properties
advanced.description: Select with custom properties on items (ISelectItem supports additional properties)

aria: Consider adding aria-selected for the selected item
Consider adding aria-activedescendant for keyboard navigation
keyboard: Consider adding Arrow Up/Down for navigation
accessibility.notes: This component could benefit from ARIA attributes and keyboard navigation for better accessibility. The searchable input does have basic keyboard support.

notes: Items are filtered by both 'label' and 'code' properties when searching
The ISelectItem interface allows additional properties via index signature
When items list has more than ~5 items (350px height), the dropdown becomes scrollable
Edit and delete icons only appear when editable prop is true
Empty state is shown when no items match the search filter
